Comfortable Accommodation: Casa Vadim in Turda offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and free WiFi. Each room includes a refrigerator, shower, TV, dining area, and wardrobe.
Leisure Facilities: Guests can relax by the swimming pool with a view, enjoy the garden, and unwind on the terrace. Free on-site private parking is available.
Local Attractions: Located 8 km from Turda Salt Mine, 35 km from Cluj Arena and Banffy Palace, and 5 km from Potaissa Roman Castrum. Cluj Avram Iancu International Airport is 41 km away.
Guest Satisfaction: Highly rated for its friendly host and impeccable room cleanliness.
